description: Evaluation test cases for the Playwright dashboard screenshot skill

test_cases.name: Default behavior — after-only screenshots
test_cases.description: A PR modifies one or more dashboard JSON files. The agent is prompted without explicitly requesting before/after. It should take post-change screenshots of only the affected dashboards and commit them to the PR.
test_cases.prompt: I just modified the overview dashboard (v2/grafana/dashboards/00-overview.json). Take screenshots of the affected dashboards.

setup.preconditions: Docker-compose stack running with seeded data. Grafana accessible at http://localhost:3004.

assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
Only after-change screenshots are present (no before screenshots) since user did not request before/after
Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)

test_cases.name: Explicit before-and-after screenshots
test_cases.description: Same setup as test 1, but the user explicitly asks for screenshots before and after changes. The agent should take a before screenshot, apply the change, then take an after screenshot, and commit both.
test_cases.prompt: I'm about to modify the deployment frequency dashboard (v2/grafana/dashboards/01-deployment-frequency.json). Please take before and after screenshots of the affected dashboards.

setup.preconditions: Docker-compose stack running with seeded data. Grafana accessible at http://localhost:3004. Dashboard change has NOT been applied yet.

assertions.description: When before-and-after is requested, both a pre-change and post-change screenshot are present
The screenshot file names clearly identify which dashboard they belong to and whether they are before or after
Exactly two screenshots per affected dashboard (one before, one after)
Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded (not blank/loading)

test_cases.name: Edge case — no dashboard changes
test_cases.description: A PR only modifies TypeScript source files (e.g., src/sync/orchestrator.ts) with no dashboard JSON changes. The agent should recognize that no dashboards are affected and skip taking screenshots.
test_cases.prompt: I modified src/sync/orchestrator.ts to fix a bug. Take screenshots of any affected dashboards.

setup.preconditions: Docker-compose stack running. No dashboard JSON files were modified.

assertions.description: When no dashboards are affected by the PR, no screenshot is taken
The agent explicitly states that no dashboards were affected and no screenshots are needed
